name: bespunky
description: The BeSpunky toolkit front door. Its one skill, /bespunky:index, is a self-maintaining catalog: it lists every installed toolkit skill (grouped by plugin, each with its /bespunky-… invocation and a one-line 'use when') by reading the live available-skills set, so it never goes stale. All toolkit plugins share the bespunky- namespace prefix, so typing /bespunky in the slash menu filters the autocomplete to the whole toolkit at once — this index plus every skill.
